ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْفَجْرِ ١
ayahs.translation: By the dawn

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ ٢
ayahs.translation: And [by] ten nights

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ ٣
ayahs.translation: And [by] the even [number] and the odd

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَسْرِ ٤
ayahs.translation: And [by] the night when it passes,

ayahs.textUthmani: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلْ فِى ذَٲلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: هَلۡ فِىۡ ذٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِىۡ حِجۡرٍؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?
ayahs.transliteration: Hal fee zaalika qasamul lizee hijr

ayahs.textUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with ʿAad -
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kaifa fa'ala rabbuka bi'aad

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ ٧
ayahs.translation: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: الَّتِىۡ لَمۡ يُخۡلَقۡ مِثۡلُهَا فِى الۡبِلَادِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
ayahs.transliteration: Allatee lam yukhlaq misluhaa fil bilaad

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُواْ ٱلصَّخْرَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٩
ayahs.translation: And [with] Thamūd, who carved out the rocks in the valley?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفِرْعَوْنَ ذِى ٱلْأَوْتَادِ ١٠
ayahs.translation: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوْاْ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ ١١
ayahs.translation: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَكْثَرُواْ فِيهَا ٱلْفَسَادَ ١٢
ayahs.translation: And increased therein the corruption.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّكَ سَوْطَ عَذَابٍ ١٣
ayahs.translation: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ ١٤
ayahs.translation: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَمَّا الۡاِنۡسَانُ اِذَا مَا ابۡتَلٰٮهُ رَبُّهٗ فَاَكۡرَمَهٗ وَنَعَّمَهٗ  ۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ رَبِّىۡۤ اَكۡرَمَنِؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-ammal insaanu izaa mab talaahu Rabbuhoo fa-akramahoo Wa-na'-'amahoo fa-yaqoolu Rabbeee akraman

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَـٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمَّاۤ اِذَا مَا ابۡتَلٰٮهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقَهٗ ۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ رَبِّىۡۤ اَهَانَنِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ammaaa izaa mab talaahu faqadara 'alaihi rizqahoo fa-yaqoolu Rabbeee ahaanan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا‌ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ ١٧
ayahs.translation: No! But you do not honor the orphan

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ ١٨
ayahs.translation: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَأْكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكْلاً لَّمًّا ١٩
ayahs.translation: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلْمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّا ٢٠
ayahs.translation: And you love wealth with immense love.

ayahs.textUthmani: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: كَلَّاۤ اِذَا دُكَّتِ الۡاَرۡضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed
ayahs.transliteration: Kallaaa izaaa dukkatil ardu dakkan dakka

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا ٢٢
ayahs.translation: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجِاْىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذِۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ‌ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ ٢٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَجِاىْٓءَ يَوۡمَٮِٕذٍۢ بِجَهَنَّمَ  ۙ​ يَوۡمَٮِٕذٍ يَّتَذَكَّرُ الۡاِنۡسَانُ وَاَنّٰى لَـهُ الذِّكۡرٰىؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but how [i.e., what good] to him will be the remembrance?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-jeee'a yawma'izim bi-jahannnam; Yawma-'iziny yatazakkarul insaanu Wa-annaa lahuz zikraa

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى قَدَّمْتُ لِحَيَاتِى ٢٤
ayahs.translation: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُعَذِّبُ عَذَابَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً ٢٨
ayahs.translation: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَـٰدِى ٢٩
ayahs.translation: And enter among My [righteous] servants

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱدْخُلِى جَنَّتِى ٣٠
ayahs.translation: And enter My Paradise."
